title: ophryosporus cumingii
intro: Ophryosporus cumingii, also known as the Cuming's buttonbush, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and flowers of the Ophryosporus cumingii plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a sought-after herb in herbal remedies.
